question: BNB Up or Down - March 20, 8:00PM-12:00AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the BNB price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BNB/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/bnb-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BNB/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Kevin Durant: Points O/U 23.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Kevin Durant scores more than 23.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Kevin Durant scores 23.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Hawks vs. Rockets
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Hawks win, the market will resolve to "Hawks".
If the Rockets win, the market will resolve to "Rockets".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: Houston Rockets' strong 8-3 start and four-game win streak anchor their 65.5% implied probability against the Atlanta Hawks, who sit at 4-7 with back-to-back losses. Key injuries plague Atlanta, including Trae Young (Achilles) out indefinitely and Jalen Johnson sidelined with shoulder issues, thinning their backcourt and frontcourt depth. Houston benefits from home-court edge at Toyota Center, where they've won five straight, and their elite defense—top-5 in opponent points per game—counters Atlanta's inconsistent offense. Head-to-head, Rockets dominated last season's meetings, fueling trader consensus on Houston's momentum despite the Hawks' desperation for a road upset.

eventMetadata.context_description: Timberwolves' six-game win streak and Portland's mounting injuries anchor the 72% implied probability favoring Minnesota, reflecting trader consensus on the Wolves' defensive dominance and offensive firepower led by Anthony Edwards. The Trail Blazers, mired in a five-game skid with a 2-8 record, face a setback without Jerami Grant (out, knee) and Deandre Ayton (questionable, illness), crippling their frontcourt rebounding against Minnesota's elite paint protection. Head-to-head, the Wolves have won seven of the last 10 meetings, bolstered by home-court edge and fresher legs off two days' rest versus Portland's back-to-back fatigue. While upsets occur, recent form and roster health heavily tilt market sentiment toward Minnesota.

Head-to-head, the Wolves have won seven of the last 10 meetings, bolstered by home-court edge and fresher legs off two days' rest versus Portland's back-to-back fatigue. While upsets occur, recent form and roster health heavily tilt market sentiment toward Minnesota.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 46.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between L1ga Team and Spirit Academy in the PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B, initially scheduled for March 20 at 7:30AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 47 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Dota 2: L1ga Team vs Spirit Academy (BO3) - PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between L1ga Team and Spirit Academy in the PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B, initially scheduled for March 20 at 7:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "L1ga Team" if L1ga Team win the match against Spirit Academy.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against L1ga Team.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy holds a trader-favored edge in this BO3 matchup against L1ga Team in PREMIER SERIES Play-In Group B, with implied probabilities reflecting their stronger recent form, including a 3-1 record over the last five series versus L1ga's 2-3 slump. Head-to-head history slightly favors Spirit Academy (2-1 in prior BO3s), bolstered by key carry player Miposhka's high KDA in academy play and adaptive drafting on the current 7.36 patch. L1ga Team's midlaner Rodjer has shown hero pool flexibility but struggles against Spirit's aggressive laning. No major roster changes or injuries reported; watch for Group B standings pressure, where a win advances Spirit while L1ga risks elimination. Momentum and crowd wisdom point to a competitive but Academy-leaning series.

eventMetadata.context_description: New York Knicks hold an 88.5% implied probability as heavy favorites against the Brooklyn Nets, driven primarily by their superior recent form and healthier lineup. The Knicks boast a 5-2 record early in the season, fueled by Jalen Brunson's 28.6 points per game and Karl-Anthony Towns' return to full strength after a preseason ankle tweak, per official injury reports. In contrast, the Nets sit at 1-6, hampered by Nic Claxton's extended knee absence and Cam Thomas' questionable status with a back issue, weakening their defense and scoring. Knicks also own a 4-1 edge in recent head-to-heads, amplified by home-court advantage at Madison Square Garden, where they shoot 48% from the field. Trader consensus reflects these roster and momentum edges, though Nets' desperation could spark an upset.

Celtics enter healthy and surging on a four-game win streak, boasting top-tier efficiency led by Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown. Boston's home-court edge and superior recent form against sub-.500 teams further solidify the odds, reflecting historical dominance in similar lopsided scenarios despite basketball's upset potential.

question: Counter-Strike: ex-RUBY vs K27 (BO3) - ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #2 Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between ex-RUBY and K27 in the ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #2 Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 21 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ex-RUBY" if ex-RUBY win the match against K27.

This market will resolve to "K27" if K27 win the match against ex-RUBY.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins.

Warriors limp in at 1-4 road form, outscored by 12 per 100 possessions without Curry, while Detroit's athletic frontcourt exploits Golden State's thin wing depth in this key Eastern Conference tilt. Upsets remain possible given NBA volatility.

question: Valorant: Sharper Esport vs 555 (BO3) - VCL Southeast Asia: Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Valorant Upper bracket semifinal 2 match between Sharper Esport and 555 in the VCL Southeast Asia: Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 21 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Sharper Esport" if Sharper Esport win the match against 555.

This market will resolve to "555" if 555 win the match against Sharper Esport.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant Upper bracket semifinal 2 match between Sharper Esport and 555 in the VCL Southeast Asia: Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 21 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Sharper Esport and 555 play 3 or more maps in this series.

If fewer than 3 maps are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Hyperliquid price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the HYPE/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/hype-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream HYPE/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
